response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and leadership roles (e.g., Stripe, Shopify), but his management experience is not explicitly clear in terms of people leadership or team development. His work in developer tools (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators) aligns well with the role, though his focus on web/mobile rather than mobile-platform ecosystems is a partial mismatch. His open-source contributions and workshops demonstrate technical breadth and mentorship potential.
strengths: Deep technical expertise in developer tools and automation (e.g., MCP, AI-agent infrastructure, build systems)
Proven leadership in technical projects and mentorship (e.g., workshops, open-source contributions, team leadership at Stripe/Shopify)
Strong cross-functional collaboration experience (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby, dev-ops infrastructure at Altom Consulting)
concerns: Limited explicit people-management experience in a formal mid-to-senior leadership role (only inferred from leadership tasks)
No direct experience with mobile-platform ecosystems or their specific developer tools/build systems
Recent roles (Stripe 2025-present, Shopify 2021-2025) may lack long-term continuity in a single domain
